invariants.claim: The public Spore DOB remains immutable; mutable behaviour lives only in DobEvolutionStateV1.
Only version 1 intents and state cells are accepted.
The state line uses ckb_type_id identity and successor replacement preserves the state TypeHash.
spore_id and cluster_id cannot change after initialisation.
invariants.location: evolve_dob_state and finalise_dob_state intent echo checks

invariants.claim: Every successor increments generation by exactly one and rejects u64 overflow.
Final phase is terminal and no action accepts Final as an input phase.
Evolution requires the state-line CKB lock to authorise the input and the successor must preserve owner_lock.
invariants.location: owner_lock fields in DobEvolutionStateV1 plus intent.owner_lock == old_state.owner_lock guards

invariants.claim: Each accepted action creates an immutable DobEvolutionEventV1 receipt and carries forward a computed event hash chain.
invariants.location: expected_event_hash hash_pair tree plus previous_event_hash checks in all actions

invariants.claim: Active-to-Active evolution is accepted only through evolve_dob_state action guards because the flow DSL rejects explicit no-op edges.
invariants.location: evolve_dob_state old_phase/new_phase checks and DobEvolutionStateV1.phase flow block

invariants.claim: The package is namespace-aware and must be published, source-hash checked, build-locked, and deployment-verified fail-closed before production use.
